title: hack: support setting local region/zone
body: Supports users of `hack/get_ci_vm.sh` far away from the default `us-central1-a` zone.  Added a message showing the current zone, and suggesting that exporting `ZONE` to something else may be used to improve VM access speed.

comments.body: @vrothberg PTAL...a small thing to make this easier than editing the script every time :smile:
